{{CargoRelic
|name=Clark Sickle Leaf Carpet
|class_id=21652
|rank=AAA
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=A Safavid-era masterpiece. Deep red with curved leaf patterns, woven in Persian knots. Geometry meets nature's flow.
|fame=35
|art=71
|fth=45
|civ=55
|tech=37
|ss1=Per 30 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +120<br>Per 30 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +12
|ss2=Per 30 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +160<br>Per 30 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +16
|ss3=Per 30 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +200<br>Per 30 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +20
|ss4=Per 30 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +280<br>Per 30 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +28
|ss5=Per 30 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +360<br>Per 30 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +36
|ss7=Per 30 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +360<br>Per 30 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +36<br>Per 30 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +28 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:skill@1123_1_1.png|50px]]prop@4081_2
|skill2=[[File:skill@1124_1_1.png|50px]]prop@4069_2
}}
